title: All screens, Close button
scenario: Verify that clicking the Close (X) button on any onboarding screen closes the flow and returns the user to the original screen.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding flow.
On each onboarding screen, locate and click the Close (X) button.
Observe the screen that appears after clicking Close.
expected: Clicking the Close (X) button on every onboarding screen closes the onboarding flow and returns the user to the original screen (Supported Devices or Home screen).
